test.name: s1ecosportal

kw.name: s1ecosportal Login code
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: invalid session id; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff724230295+146d5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff724230300+14740] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff723f9d5b6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff723fe8093] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff72401fe72] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff72401a0d1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff724019383] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff723f660b5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff724545949+329d89] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff72453fe96+3242d6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff724563102+347542] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff72424d425+31865] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff72425605c+3a49c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff723f64e4a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7246a2118+486558] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff927c7259d+1d] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff929f8af78+28]
